name: ai-plan-issue
description: Turn large development goals into collaborative issue plans with a realtime local board for Codex-led work.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and run development through realtime issue boards.
interface.longDescription: AI Plan Issue helps Codex turn large goals into parent and child issues, claim focused work, discuss decisions, and keep a local realtime collaboration board synchronized with Markdown and JSONL project records.
defaultPrompt: Turn this project goal into AI Plan Issues.
Open the AI Plan Issue realtime board.
Claim and run the next ready issue.
